name: Black Diamond Pickleball Complex
description: Black Diamond Pickleball Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marion, IL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Harrison - Bruce Tennis Courts
description: Harrison - Bruce Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marion, IL. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: SIU Student Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at SIU Student Recreation Center in Carterville, IL! There are 3 indoor hard and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: The HUB Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at The HUB Recreation Center in Marion, IL! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
